data.name: Christmas Hentai Party
data.detailed_description:
Another lonely Christmas, but fortunately for you, there's a Christmas hookup party where tons of horny, like-minded people like you meet up for a chance to get some sensual action. Unfortunately for you, you overslept, and the party is over. Just when you're about to leave, you spot a woman who looks disappointed, and just like you, she was late to the party too, and she's hell-bent on getting a good dicking down.

Experience a night with a foul-mouthed, bitchy, mysterious, perverted woman who's hellbent on getting laid on Christmas Eve, and you're her target for tonight.

  • ~1.2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 20 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
